content.text:
Lint clean (warnings only in unrelated legacy files). TypeScript check passed. Files exist.

**Summary**

- Created `src/content/site/footer.ts` exporting `footerLinks` with `external` (GitHub, Email, LinkedIn pulled from `identity.ts`) and `site` (Changelog only — no `/colophon` route exists, so omitted per spec).
- Replaced stub `src/components/shell/SiteFooter.tsx` with a real footer: full-width strip, `border-top: 1px var(--line)`, `Container size="wide"`, two-column on desktop / stacked on mobile, copyright left in `--fg-faint` / `--t-sm-size`, link cluster right separated by " · ", external links use `<Link variant="subtle" external>` (gets ↗ + new-tab).
- Added `.shell-footer` styles to `src/styles/primitives.css` next to the existing `.shell-header` block.
- No animations, no newsletter form, no social icons, no "Built with" line.

Verification: `test -f` both paths PASS; `tsc --noEmit` clean; `npm run lint` clean for new files.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS

- Added `.shell-footer` styles to `src/styles/primitives.css` next to the existing `.shell-header` block.
- No animations, no newsletter form, no social icons, no "Built with" line.
